data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where the persona 'The Mobile Service Provider (Jake)' takes payment in the parking lot. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the expected outcome of this scenario, nor are there any API reads or persisted state checks to demonstrate that the scenario behavior is supported. The linked use cases do not provide sufficient details or evidence to validate this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the scenario behavior of taking payment in the parking lot.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the scenario behavior.
